channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Siri AI Is Becoming Apple’s Everything Tool - WIRED
item.description:
1. Siri AI Is Becoming Apple’s Everything Tool  WIRED
  2. 5 Siri AI Features That Will Change How You Use Your iPhone, iPad, & Mac  bgr.com
  3. Every cool thing you can do with Apple’s new Siri AI app  Popular Science
  4. My old Pixel keeps getting AI features Apple wants a newer iPhone for  Digital Trends
  5. Apple's new Siri AI aims to dominate personal assistant market through scale and privacy  eMarketer

item.title: Obsidian director criticizes ‘cold take artists’ spreading ‘misinformation’ about the studio’s legacy - Video Games Chronicle
item.description:
1. Obsidian director criticizes ‘cold take artists’ spreading ‘misinformation’ about the studio’s legacy  Video Games Chronicle
  2. Microsoft’s Xbox to Shift Obsidian Studio to New ‘Fallout’ Video Game  Bloomberg.com
  3. Report: Obsidian Cancels Avowed Sequel To Begin Work On A New Fallout Game  Game Informer
  4. Obsidian Dev Addresses Critics Discussing Studio's Current Situation  80 Level
  5. New Fallout Game First Details And Gameplay Appear Online  ScreenRant

item.title: A top Halo studio boss has been repeatedly referred to HR, according to new reports - Windows Central
item.description:
1. A top Halo studio boss has been repeatedly referred to HR, according to new reports  Windows Central
  2. "Destroying Halo": Pierre Hintze Accused Of Mismanagement And Abuse  TheGamer
  3. Pierre Hintze Berated Halo Teams and Dismissed Work-Life Concerns, Sources Claim, as Xbox Leadership Stayed Silent  Wccftech
  4. Rumor: Halo Studios/343 Industries Leadership Accused Of Maltreating Employees  gameranx.com
  5. Scandal at Halo Studios: Management Accused of Abuse and Intimidation  ixbt.games

item.title: Pokémon GO Water Festival 2026 Guide – Arrokuda, Cramorant, Bonuses and GO Pass - Pokémon GO Hub
item.description:
1. Pokémon GO Water Festival 2026 Guide – Arrokuda, Cramorant, Bonuses and GO Pass  Pokémon GO Hub

  3. Pokemon Go Ultra Unlock: Water Festival Features Arrokuda, Barraskewda  Restart.run
